---
title: "Teaching"
---
```{=html}
<div class="teaching-section">
<h3>Instructor of Record</h3>
<p class="teaching-section-intro">Selected courses taught across doctoral, undergraduate, and introductory economics programs.</p>
<div class="teaching-list">
  <div class="teaching-item">
    <h4>University of Alabama</h4>
    <p class="teaching-note">Causal Inference (PhD), Spring 2026<br />
    Intermediate Microeconomics (Undergraduate), Spring 2026</p>
  </div>

  <div class="teaching-item">
    <h4>Université Mohammed VI Polytechnique</h4>
    <p class="teaching-note">Econometrics I (PhD), Fall 2021-2024<br />
    Econometrics I (Undergraduate), Fall 2022-2024<br />
    Macroéconomie II, Spring 2021-2025<br />
    Méthodes Quantitatives (Undergraduate), Spring 2025<br />
    Mathematics and Optimisation for Economists, Fall 2021</p>
  </div>

  <div class="teaching-item">
    <h4>Temple University</h4>
    <p class="teaching-note">Principles of Macroeconomics, Fall 2018 and 2019; Spring 2019 and 2020<br />
    Intermediate Microeconomics, Summer 2018<br />
    Principles of Microeconomics, Summer 2015 and 2016; Fall 2017</p>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="teaching-section">
<h3>Teaching Assistant</h3>
<p class="teaching-section-intro">Earlier teaching support experience.</p>
<div class="teaching-list">
  <div class="teaching-item">
    <h4>Temple University</h4>
    <p class="teaching-note">Principles of Microeconomics, Fall 2014; Spring 2015; Fall 2015; Spring 2016; Fall 2016; Spring 2017</p>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```
